_readme: Rename to settings.json. Hooks are deterministic — they run regardless of what Claude decides. Use them for must-happen-every-time enforcement. Adjust commands to match your project's package.json scripts.
_mcp_readme: MCP servers extend Claude's capabilities (filesystem access, web search, databases, GitHub, etc.). Remove this block if you don't need MCP. See https://modelcontextprotocol.io for the full server list.

mcpServers._note: Remove this _note key before use. Examples below — uncomment what you need.

filesystem._comment: Gives Claude read/write access to directories outside the workspace. Useful for scripts that touch multiple repos.

github._comment: GitHub API: read/create issues, PRs, files. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in env.

sqlite._comment: Run SQL queries against a local SQLite database. Replace the path with your actual db file.

hooks._note: Auto-fix lint/format on every file edit. The || true prevents non-fatal warnings from blocking work.
Typecheck runs before Claude ends its turn. If it fails, Claude sees the error and fixes before declaring done.
